_meta.description: Golden set — pre-labeled PA cases with known-correct decisions for eval and grading
_meta.purpose: Used by _5-eval sub-skill to grade AI decisions against expert-labeled ground truth
_meta.note: Fictional cases for PoC demonstration only

golden_cases.rationale: All 14 criteria met. Clear RA biologic case with complete step therapy, labs within range, no contraindications. Should never require human review.
golden_cases.labeled_by: Dr. A. Chen, Senior Medical Director

golden_cases.rationale: Missing HbA1c, fasting glucose, and second-line step therapy. Document checker should catch all three. No clinical judgment required — purely a completeness failure.
golden_cases.labeled_by: Dr. A. Chen, Senior Medical Director

deny_reasons_expected: CRP 4.1 mg/L below active-disease threshold (>10 mg/L)
Calprotectin 180 mcg/g below active-disease threshold (>250 mcg/g)
Step therapy incomplete — only Mesalamine documented, immunomodulator required
golden_cases.rationale: Both disease-activity markers below threshold. Hard-stop denial. No clinical ambiguity.
golden_cases.labeled_by: Dr. A. Chen, Senior Medical Director

golden_cases.rationale: PD-L1 TPS 45% is genuinely ambiguous — falls between 1st-line threshold (≥50%) and 2nd-line threshold (≥1%). Line of therapy not documented. AI correctly cannot resolve this without human clinical judgment.
golden_cases.escalation_reason_expected: Ambiguous line of therapy — PD-L1 TPS 45% requires clinical determination of whether patient is 1st-line or 2nd-line

golden_cases.rationale: Correct stage is AWAITING_INFO. Case manager should flag AT RISK (47h of 72h elapsed) and generate call script. No clinical decision needed — this is a workflow management case.
Queue summary is a reporting function — no clinical judgment involved. Eval checks that the 3 breached cases and 6 at-risk nurse cases are correctly surfaced.
